title: Add hours to time tracker without start and stop times
excerpt: We would really like to be able to add time to the time tracker without having to give start and stop times, as this is quite time consuming in itself. Is this something that might be considered in a future update?

posts.author: StephRH (Steph King)
posts.cookedHtml: We would really like to be able to add time to the time tracker without having to give start and stop times, as this is quite time consuming in itself. Is this something that might be considered in a future update?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @StephRH !

As of right now entering the start and stop times is not a full feature on the time tracking.

There is also another community post that is open for votes here: Option for Time Tracking only duration instead of requiring start/end times

Voting on the same subject also helps the monday.com team know how much demand is on a feature.

posts.author: miss.meg (Megan Paskin)
posts.cookedHtml: YES PLEASE! We are having to “fake” start and stop times because it is so tedious. Would be nice to just add “1 hour” “30 mins” etc to each day.
